'''Sris Lehhett''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Centran]] [[Fleet Admiral/Legends|Fleet Admiral]] in the [[Centrality/Legends|Centrality]] [[Centrality Navy|Navy]]. In [[25 ABY/Legends|25 ABY]], shortly after the start of the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]], he launched a bloody military coup, overthrew [[Scrivinir]] [[Tavell Geen]], and declared himself Scrinivir.<ref name="THH" />

Although Geen fled to [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] to petition the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] for help, it is doubtful that they ever agreed, given their state throughout much of the war. Although it is believed that the Centrality tried to stay out of the war.<ref name="THH" />
